## Before You Submit

Do not paste resume text, Firebase ID tokens, Authorization headers, API keys, passwords, private personal data, or real interview answers into this issue.

## User Type

- [ ] Student preparing for placements
- [ ] Fresher / fresh graduate
- [ ] Working professional switching jobs
- [ ] Preparing for IT/product company interviews
- [ ] Other:

## What Did You Test?

- [ ] Signup/login
- [ ] Onboarding/profile setup
- [ ] Interview question generation
- [ ] Answer submission
- [ ] AI feedback
- [ ] Resume analysis
- [ ] Progress tracking
- [ ] Usage limit messages
- [ ] Legal links
- [ ] Subscription/premium fallback

## Usefulness Of AI Feedback

Was the answer feedback useful? What helped, and what felt weak or unclear?

## Usefulness Of Resume Analysis

Was the resume analysis understandable and actionable?

## Confusing Parts

What felt confusing, slow, broken, or hard to trust?

## Missing Features

What feature would make IntervueAI more useful for your interview preparation?

## Willingness To Pay

Would you pay for unlimited practice or premium features?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] Maybe
- [ ] No

Optional reason:

## Overall Rating

Rate your beta experience from 1 to 5:

- [ ] 1
- [ ] 2
- [ ] 3
- [ ] 4
- [ ] 5

## Extra Notes

Anything else you want to share?
